title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 404.021 - Single custodianship — but custodian may serve more than one minor
text:
404.021.  Single custodianship — but custodian may serve more than one minor. — A transfer of property under sections 404.005 to 404.094 may be made to only one minor and only one person may be custodian of the property transferred.  A person may be a custodian of property for more than one minor, but the custodian shall separately hold and administer the custodial property for each minor.
(L. 1985 S.B. 35, et al. § 2 subsec. 5)
